pieces.q: a {SIDE} confection sovereign with a soft swirl coronet, more slender than the king, richly piped detail down the body

pieces.b: a dipped {SIDE} teardrop cone bishop on a pedestal base, drizzled with fine piped icing
pieces.n: a {SIDE} confection steed head, richly decorated with piped icing mane detail
pieces.p: a small {SIDE} bonbon on a cookie base, richly decorated with sprinkles and drizzle

promptOverrides.bp: single chess PAWN game piece, clearly recognizable classic chess pawn silhouette, the shortest piece on the board, a small solid dark chocolate bonbon, the round dome head and the entire tapered body below it are glossy solid dark chocolate all the way down, richly decorated with a drizzle of lighter caramel icing and scattered sprinkles only on the round cookie base at the very bottom, delicious candy-shop 3D game asset render, glossy glazed surface, soft studio lighting, consistent top-left lighting, ornate, intricate surface detail, richly decorated, centered composition, plain solid gray studio background, no ground shadow, no text

notes: wr (white rook) was produced via the flux-kontext-pro recolor escape hatch from the finished br shape (dark stone gothic/castle framing reliably grew a cross on the white side after 3 text-to-image attempts) -- if regenerating wr from scratch again and it grows a cross, recolor the passing br instead of rerolling text-to-image.
